top3.sql:
SELECT 
    L.Date AS Laboratory_Date,
    CAST((julianday(L.Date) - julianday(P.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age_At_Lab
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    P.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    P.Birthday DESC, L.Date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    L.Date AS Laboratory_Date,
    CAST((julianday(L.Date) - julianday(P.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age_At_Lab
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    P.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    P.Birthday DESC, L.Date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    L.Date AS Laboratory_Date,
    CAST((julianday(L.Date) - julianday(P.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age_At_Lab,
    CAST((julianday(P.Admission) - julianday(P.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age_At_Admission
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    P.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    P.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    L.Date AS Laboratory_Date,
    CAST((julianday(L.Date) - julianday(P.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age_At_Lab
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    P.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    P.Birthday DESC, L.Date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    L.Date AS Laboratory_Date,
    CAST((julianday(L.Date) - julianday(P.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age_At_Lab,
    CAST((julianday(P.Admission) - julianday(P.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age_At_Admission
FROM 
    Patient P
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    P.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    P.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    L.Date AS Laboratory_Date,
    CAST((julianday(L.Date) - julianday(P.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age_At_Lab,
    CAST((julianday(P.Admission) - julianday(P.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age_At_Admission
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    P.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    P.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    L.Date AS Laboratory_Date,
    CAST((julianday(L.Date) - julianday(P.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age_At_Lab
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    P.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    P.Birthday DESC, L.Date ASC
LIMIT 1;
